** Purpose / Big Picture
Describe the user-visible outcome, why this slice exists, and the boundary it
is meant to improve.
** Scope and Boundaries
*** Files or Dirs to Read
- [ ] List only task-local target files and directories.
*** Commands or Tools to Run
- [ ] List exact validation and inspection commands.
*** Expected Outputs
- [ ] Define concrete implementation, documentation, and evidence outputs.
*** Stop Conditions
- [ ] Define conditions that should stop implementation or require replanning.
** TODO Plan Self Check [0/7] [0%]
- [ ] Scope matches the request and risk level.
- [ ] Files or dirs to read are complete and minimal.
- [ ] Commands or tools to run are complete and safe.
- [ ] Expected outputs are concrete and testable.
- [ ] Stop conditions are clear.
- [ ] Dependencies and constraints are recorded.
- [ ] Validation plan is adequate for risk.
** Context and Orientation
Record the current state, relevant package boundaries, and why this work needs
an ExecPlan instead of a short in-message plan.
** Plan of Work
Summarize the sequence at a level that another agent can execute without chat
history.
** TODO Concrete Steps [0/4]
:PROPERTIES:
- [ ] Research complete.
- [ ] Implementation complete.
- [ ] Tests or lint checks complete.
- [ ] Evidence and recovery notes updated.
** TODO Validation and Acceptance [0/3]
:PROPERTIES:
- [ ] Functional acceptance criteria satisfied.
- [ ] Regression tests or equivalent focused checks passed.
- [ ] Documentation or tracking surfaces updated.
** TODO Reflection and Quality Audit [0/3]
- [ ] Code audit recorded.
- [ ] Plan audit recorded.
- [ ] Verification audit recorded.
** TODO Final Validation Gate [0/3]
- [ ] Validation and Acceptance is complete.
- [ ] Reflection and Quality Audit is complete.
- [ ] Final go or no-go decision is recorded.
** Progress
- Initial plan created.
** Decision Log
- Record decisions and tradeoffs here.
** Recovery Commands
#+begin_src shell
asp org query --kind property --field key=PLAN_ID --field value=<PLAN_ID> --workspace . --view metadata
asp org query --kind property --field key=STEP_STATUS --field value=pending --workspace . --view metadata
asp org query --kind property --field key=RECEIPT_STATUS --field value=pending --workspace . --view metadata
asp org contract trace --org-contract-registry languages/org/contracts/agent.execplan.v1.org languages/org/templates/agent.execplan.v1.org
#+end_src
